title: rubus moluccanus var. fontinalis
intro: Rubus moluccanus var. fontinalis, also known as Fontinalis raspberry, is a type of raspberry plant that belongs to the rose family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Fontinalis raspberry is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed fresh or frozen as a dietary supplement.
